user.name: Name must start with a capital letter
user.nameLength: Name must be at least {length} characters long
user.surname: Surname must start with a capital letter
user.surnameLength: Surname must be at least {length} characters long
user.userName: Username must be at least {length} characters
user.password: Password must be at least {length} characters
user.passwordRequired: Password field cannot be left blank

content.length: Content must have at least 50 characters of actual text (excluding Markdown and whitespace)
content.sectionId: Section ID must be a positive number

ageRange.min: Min age must be at least 6
ageRange.max: Max age must be at least 6
ageRange.maxMin: Max age must be greater than Min age

skill.length: Skill name must be at least {length} characters long

course.title: At least {length} characters long
course.ageRangeId: Age range suitable for the course (required)
course.priceMin: Price must be at least {min} VND

curriculum.code: Course code, at least {length} characters long, used to identify the course
curriculum.title: Course title, at least {length} characters long
curriculum.description: Detailed description of the course, at least {length} characters long

learningOutcome.minLength: This field must be at least {min} characters long.
learningOutcome.maxLength: This field must be at most {max} characters long.

lesson.title: Title must be at least {length} characters long
lesson.description: Description must be at least {length} characters long
lesson.courseId: Course ID must be a positive number
lesson.learningOutcome: Learning outcome must be at least {length} characters long

section.title: Title is required
section.duration: Duration must be a non-negative number
section.lessonId: Lesson ID must be a positive number

organization.name: Organization name is required
organization.description: Description must be at least 10 characters

plan.name: Plan name is required
plan.description: Description must be at least {min} characters long
plan.price: Price must be a non-negative number
plan.accessSupportDetail: Access support detail must be at least {min} characters long
plan.curriculumCount: Curriculum count must be at least {min}
plan.maxTeacherSeats: Maximum teacher seats must be at least {min}
plan.maxStudentSeats: Maximum student seats must be at least {min}
plan.curriculumCountExceed: Curriculum count ({curriculumCount}) cannot exceed the number of available curriculums selected ({selectedCurriculums})

subscription.expiredDate: Expired date must be a valid future date
subscription.allowCurriculumExceed: You can only select up to {curriculumCount} curriculum(s)

assignment.title: Title is required and must be at least {length} characters long
assignment.passingScore: Passing score must be between 0 and 100
assignment.durationDays: Duration (in days) must be a positive number
assignment.totalPoints: Total points must be a positive number

question.point: Point(s) must be a positive number

rubric.maxPoints: Max points must be a positive number

quiz.title: Title is required
quiz.passingMarks: Passing marks must be between 0 and 100
quiz.durationDays: Duration (in days) must be a positive number
quiz.totalMarks: Total marks must be a positive number
quiz.timeLimitMinutes: Time limit (in minutes) must be a positive number
quiz.cooldownHours: Cooldown period (in hours) must be a positive number
